collection_mode: search API returns rows, detail XHR returns HTML modal
full_collection_strategy: Seed by business name / business id search API only after an Akamai-aware access plan is defined. Plain curl replay is currently blocked.
detail_strategy: The business detail is loaded by ViewXSLTFileByName.aspx with providerName=MSBSD_CorporationBusinessDetails and FilingId from the search result row.
login_strategy: No login observed for the tested search and detail sample.
anti_bot_evidence: Search document and detail XHR responses include Akamai-GRN.
Search document and detail XHR responses include Server-Timing ak_p.
Search document and detail XHR responses include x-akamai-transformed pmb=mRUM.
Browser receives bm_ss, bm_s and bm_so cookies and sensor POST refreshes bm_s.
Same-origin randomized sensor script /ywwgo-/.../P3tQ is loaded and later POSTed.
Detail response body includes inline BOOMR.plugins.AK variables such as ak.v, ak.cp, ak.ai, ak.rid and ak.gh.
Plain curl, even with exported browser cookies, receives 403 Access Denied referencing errors.edgesuite.net.
priority_validation_targets: Validate whether a browser automation skeleton can sustain repeated searches without Akamai escalation.
If a pure protocol spider is required, investigate the Akamai sensor/cookie/TLS fingerprint chain separately.
Capture multiple detail samples to verify whether providerName and FilingId are sufficient business parameters after the Akamai gate is satisfied.
blocking_risk: Plain HTTP replay is blocked at the Akamai edge. Cookie reuse alone did not reproduce the browser detail request.
first_validation_action: Use Camoufox to run several repeated BusinessNameSearch and detail clicks, then compare failures against plain protocol replay.
evidence_summary: Camoufox detail XHR status 200 with Akamai-GRN and x-akamai-transformed.
Anonymous curl status 403 with errors.edgesuite.net for search and detail endpoints.
BusinessSearchScriptV2.js maps search result FilingId to detail XHR.
